problem id: d4e29ed7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  10101101 -> 10001011
  11101011 -> 01011010
  11001110 -> 11110011
  10110100 -> 10101101
  00010001 -> 00100100
  00011011 -> 01100110
  00101011 -> 01101010
  10011010 -> 01100110
  01110010 -> 01011100

query: 01101111
predicted answer: 11111011
